channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The AndaSeat Phantom 4 Pro brings a lot to the table, but comfort takes a back seat for impressive ergonomics
item.description: The AndaSeat Phantom 4 Pro has impressive lumbar support, but loses out on comfort.

item.title: Ninja SLUSHi MAX : notre test de la machine à granités virale, 350 euros bien investis ?
item.description: La Ninja SLUSHi MAX promet le granité de fête foraine à la maison, en 15 minutes et pour 349,99 euros. Après plusieurs soirées avec, je raconte ce que ça donne vraiment : ce qui tient, ce qui fatigue, et pour qui c'est un achat malin.

item.title: Four AI supply-chain attacks in 50 days exposed the release pipeline red teams aren't covering
item.description: Four supply-chain incidents hit OpenAI, Anthropic and Meta in 50 days: three adversary-driven attacks and one self-inflicted packaging failure. None targeted the model, and all four exposed the same gap: release pipelines, dependency hooks, CI runners, and packaging gates that no system card, AISI evaluation, or Gray Swan red-team exercise has ever scoped.On May 11, 2026, a self-propagating worm called Mini Shai-Hulud published 84 malicious package versions across 42 @tanstack/* npm packages in six minutes flat. The worm rode in on release.yml, chaining a pull_request_target misconfiguration, ...

item.title: How to watch Married at First Sight USA season 19 for FREE – stream dating show from anywhere
item.description: Will these lone stars find a state of true happiness in Texas? Here's how to watch Married at First Sight US season 19 for free online wherever you are in the world – binge all episodes now!

item.title: How to watch the Google I/O 2026 keynote
item.description: Google's keynote on Tuesday will include a boatload of AI news and perhaps some Android XR updates.

item.title: PlayStation Plus : Sony annonce une hausse de prix de l’abonnement
item.description: Sony annonce une hausse de prix pour l'abonnement PlayStation Plus « en raison des conditions actuelles du marché ».

item.title: NYC Health and Hospitals says hackers stole medical data and fingerprints during breach affecting at least 1.8 million people
item.description: The New York public healthcare system said hackers stole personal and medical data, and scans of biometrics — including fingerprints — in one of the largest recorded breaches of 2026.

item.title: 5 ChatGPT hacks I wish I’d started using sooner — they completely changed how I use AI
item.description: From brutally honest feedback to clearer answers and smarter prompts, these simple ChatGPT hacks can dramatically improve the responses you get from AI.

item.title: 'It's kind of humbling to come back to a project after all these years, to know that the fans love the game and they love the character so much' — Edward Kenway's actor speaks about revisiting the character for Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
item.description: Matt Ryan, the actor behind Assassin's Creed Black Flag's Edward Kenway, has discussed revisiting the character 13 years later in the upcoming remake.

item.title: Google is rolling out its redesigned Workspace app icons
item.description: It's not just you - the Google Workspace apps are getting a new look. The redesigned app icons, leaked last month, are now rolling out widely, as we started noticing this morning. Users with the redesigned icons will notice they now have a gradient look that fades from lighter to darker shades, rather than being […]

item.title: Sony is raising short-subscription prices for PlayStation Plus
item.description: Sony is hiking the starting price of one-month and three-month PlayStation Plus subscriptions in "select regions," blaming "ongoing market conditions." Beginning May 20th, 1-month subscriptions will start at $10.99 USD / €9.99 EUR / £7.99 GBP, while 3-month subscriptions will start at $27.99 USD / €27.99 EUR / £21.99 GBP. In the US, the changes […]

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. Elon Musk, his financial […]

item.title: Sony hit with a class action lawsuit for allegedly profiting from tariff-related price hikes
item.description: The case against Sony is similar to ones filed against Nintendo and Amazon.

item.title: LangSmith Engine closes the agent debugging loop automatically — but multi-model enterprises still need a neutral layer
item.description: Enterprises building and deploying agents have a problem: it’s taking their engineers too long to find out that an agent made a mistake, and the loop has continued to perpetuate, especially without a human at every step. LangSmith, the monitoring and evaluation platform from LangChain, launched a new capability in public beta that could make that issue more manageable. LangSmith Engine automates the entire chain by detecting production failures, diagnosing root causes against the live codebase, drafting a fix and preventing regression. It does this in a single automated pass. LangSmith Engine ...

item.title: Ce moniteur gaming polyvalent (255 Hz, 0,03 ms, 1440p) est bradé à un super prix chez Boulanger
item.description: L'Asus XG27ACMES possède une fiche technique complète avec du 1440p, un taux de rafraîchissement de 255 Hz et l'AMD FreeSync. Déjà abordable, ce moniteur le devient encore plus avec cette remise de 8 % chez Boulanger.

item.title: Elon Musk reportedly owes quite a few of his employees $420
item.description: xAI promised workers the money in exchange for tax information to train Grok.

item.title: Les 10 smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid : le Honor 600 fait une percée devant l’hégémonie Samsung
item.description: Pour notre top 10 des smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid, c'est le Honor 600 qui emporte la palme devant deux téléphones Samsung. Viennent ensuite d'autres modèles sous Android pour compléter ce top 10.

item.title: Robot contre humain : qui trie les colis le plus vite ? Ce concours a tranché
item.description: Le concours de tri de colis entre le robot Figure 03 et le stagiaire Aime s'est terminé par une victoire serrée pour Aime, qui a trié 12 924 colis contre 12 732 pour le robot. Le stagiaire a traité chaque colis légèrement plus vite que le robot, mais a bénéficié de pauses, contrairement à Figure 03, qui ne s'est toujours pas arrêté de travailler à l'heure où nous écrivons ces lignes....

item.title: 'Almost entirely unmanageable': Linus Torvalds says AI bug hunters have ruined Linux security mailing list
item.description: Torvalds says everyone is using AI to report on the same flaws, most of which have already been fixed.

item.title: How to watch The Dark Side of Married at First Sight from anywhere – it's *FREE*
item.description: Here's how to watch The Dark Side of Married at First Sight online from anywhere in the world, completely FREE.

item.title: Google Gemini app to get deeper thinking and more third-party app support, report says
item.description: Google's Gemini app adds extended thinking levels, plus third-party integrations.

item.title: Edward Kenway actor says among the new scenes for Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced there's one that adds 'more weight' to the character's personal conflict
item.description: Matt Ryan, the actor behind Assassin's Creed Black Flag's Edward Kenway, has confirmed that he filmed new scenes for Resynced that deepen that character's personal journey.

item.title: Lanterns has received a thrilling new trailer ahead of its August launch on HBO Max — and it feels like a direct response to fan criticisms of the DC comic book show's first teaser
item.description: Lanterns' latest trailer asks 'are you afraid?' following fan fears that it wouldn't be the epic sci-fi thriller they were hoping for.

item.title: Volvo reveals $58,400 starting price for the EX60
item.description: Volvo's upcoming mainstream EV SUV is available to order now.

item.title: Lanterns trailer promises jade DC action with Aaron Pierre and Kyle Chandler
item.description: It's Green Lantern but not as fans know it, with a new teaser dropped for HBO's "Lanterns," starring Aaron Pierre and Kyle Chandler.

item.title: Close the skills gap through employer-educator collaboration
item.description: Partnerships also help the emerging workforce prepare for needed jobs. Higher education is under pressure from every direction. Shifts in finance and policy, high tuition costs, and a decline in public trust have forced colleges and universities to rethink how they prepare people for work. At the same time, employers face persistent talent shortages and widening skills gaps....

item.title: Amazon Alexa Plus can now create AI-generated podcasts
item.description: Alexa Plus, Amazon's upgraded AI assistant, can now generate podcasts on "virtually any topic," according to an announcement on Monday. With the update, Amazon says you can give Alexa Plus a topic, and the AI assistant will offer an overview of what its AI hosts plan to talk about, allowing you to steer the conversation […]

item.title: White House announces $17 billion trade deal with China to boost U.S. beef and poultry
item.description: China has been increasingly turning to other countries like Brazil and Argentina for imported farm goods. China has agreed to ramp up trade for U.S. agricultural products such as beef and poultry, buying at an annualized rate of $17 billion per year for 2026 and at that level for 2027 and 2028, the White House announced Sunday, two days after President Donald Trump returned from a high-stakes summit in Beijing where he sought to ease the impact on American farmers from the trade war he launched last year.China would restore market access for U.S. beef and resume imports of poultry from U.S. s...

item.title: The new competitive edge brand leaders need to know
item.description: Algorithmic literacy is changing how brands are appearing to audiences. The most challenging conversation to have with brands is one that defies a commonly held belief: great content is enough. For decades, the marketing industry has abided by the same foundational belief that if they create something worthy of attention, their target audience will naturally engage with it. But this approach is a liability for both their reach and revenue....

item.title: What are those heartbeats on Hinge?
item.description: Hinge's new feature, Signals, is in testing, and it measures thoughtful participation.

item.title: Test du Mova LiDAX Ultra 1000 : la tonte autonome sans antenne, sans fil et sans (trop) se prendre la tête
item.description: Filiale de Dreame, Mova décline avec le LiDAX Ultra 1000 un robot tondeuse à navigation LiDAR 3D vendu sous la barre symbolique des 1 000 €, sur un segment longtemps réservé aux modèles deux fois plus chers.

item.title: The best Memorial Day mattress deals to shop this week
item.description: Shop the best Memorial Day mattress deals from brands like Saatva, DreamCloud, and Avocado. Save hundreds on a new bed today.

item.title: Microsoft Teams won’t put everyone in a virtual room anymore — no more Together-ness
item.description: Microsoft is ending Together mode in Microsoft Teams.

item.title: Why we’re living through the cable TV moment of the internet
item.description: Why creator-led networks will be the next media business ecosystem. For most of the past decade, individuals have largely defined the creator economy: one creator, one channel, and one voice, building a direct relationship with an audience. That model has produced massive businesses and cultural influence. It’s not the end state. It’s the starting point....

item.title: 1 333 km d’autonomie, opulence absolue et technologies Huawei : la Maextro S800 Grand Design veut faire trembler les géants du luxe anglais
item.description: Huawei et le constructeur chinois JAC lèvent le voile sur la Maextro S800 Grand Design, version « Collector's Edition » de leur berline de luxe. Prévue pour faire ses débuts en juin, elle se distingue par un raffinement poussé à son paroxysme qui a clairement de quoi donner quelques sueurs froides à Rolls-Royce et Bentley.

item.title: Google's much-improved app icons are rolling out now
item.description: The old icons that debuted five years ago had very little to visually differentiate them.
